name: Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat the eggs well in a separate bowl, then add the remaining ingredients (vanilla, vinegar, corn meal, and cream).
3. Gently fold the egg mixture into the butter and sugar mixture.
4. Pour the batter into the pre-made pie shell.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce the temperature to 325 degrees F and continue baking for an additional 25 minutes or until set.
